key.name: show-section-headers
key.description: When enabled, the account list groups consecutive rows by issuer and renders a small heading above the first row of each issuer run. Vault insertion order is preserved — rows are never reordered for grouping. Disabled by default so the list stays compact.

key.name: show-column-headers
key.description: When enabled, the account list shows the column header strip (Account / Code / Time / Copy / Menu) at the top of the list. Enabled by default so the ColumnView shape is labelled out of the box; users who prefer a compact list can hide it from the Display preferences group.
